content.query:
-- 1. apply xd rules to enrollment data
-- find all member ids that have HEII zip3s in control
delete from appl.ino_control_memberuids_w_heii_zip3_t;
insert into appl.ino_control_memberuids_w_heii_zip3_t
(memberuid, zip3)
select 
    b.memberuid, a.zip3
FROM 
    [appl].[deid_ino_control_heii_t] a
    inner join customer.stg_ino_control_tokens_t b
        on a.input_token = b.token
where 
    a.zip3 not in ('', '000');
GO

-- CREATE STATISTICS stg_incr_claims_1_zip3 ON [customer].[stg_incr_claims_1_t]([PATIENT_ZIP_3]);

-- redact age, gender, zip3, race in control
delete from [appl].[deid_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t];
go

insert into [appl].[deid_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t]
(
	[memberuid],
	[monthbegindate],
	[monthenddate],
	[ageatendyear],
	[gendercode],
	[zip3value],
	[raceethnicitycode],
	[payergroupcode],
	[payertypecode],
	[productcode],
	[medicalindicator],
	[rxindicator],
	[macontracttypecode],
	[groupplantypecode],
	[acaindicator],
	[acaissuerstatecode],
	[acagrandfatheredindicator],
	[acaonexchangeindicator],
	[acametallevel],
	[acaactuarialvalue],
	[sourceid],
	[createddate]
)
select 
	c.[memberuid],
	[monthbegindate],
	[monthenddate],
	-- redact age
    coalesce(a.age_lvl2, '') as [ageatendyear],
    -- redact gender
	case when [gendercode] is null or [gendercode] = '' then 'U' else [gendercode] end as [gendercode],
	-- redact zip3
    case when h.memberuid is not null then ''
        when (c.[zip3value] not like '%_%' and z2.zip3 is null) or c.[zip3value] is null or c.[zip3value] = '' then '000' 
    else coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[zip3value]) 
    end AS [zip3value],
	-- redact race
    case when [raceethnicitycode] is null or [raceethnicitycode] = '' then 'U' else [raceethnicitycode] end as [raceethnicitycode],
	[payergroupcode],
	[payertypecode],
	[productcode],
	[medicalindicator],
	[rxindicator],
	[macontracttypecode],
	[groupplantypecode],
	[acaindicator],
	[acaissuerstatecode],
	[acagrandfatheredindicator],
	[acaonexchangeindicator],
	[acametallevel],
	[acaactuarialvalue],
	[sourceid],
	[createddate]
from 
    [customer].[stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t] c 
    left join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
        on c.[zip3value] = z1.zip3_from
    left join (select distinct zip3 from [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]) z2
        on coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[zip3value]) = z2.zip3
    left join appl.ino_control_memberuids_w_heii_zip3_t h
        on c.memberuid = h.memberuid
    left join [dim].[age_ranges_t] a
        on cast(c.ageatendyear as int) between a.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound;
GO


-- find all member ids that have HEII zip3s in treatment
delete from appl.ino_treatment_memberuids_w_heii_zip3_t;
insert into appl.ino_treatment_memberuids_w_heii_zip3_t
(memberuid, zip3)
select 
    b.memberuid, a.zip3
FROM 
    [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_heii_t] a
    inner join customer.stg_ino_treatment_tokens_t b
        on a.input_token = b.token
where 
    a.zip3 not in ('', '000');
GO

-- redact age, gender, zip3, race in treatment
delete from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t];
go

insert into [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t]
(
	[memberuid],
	[monthbegindate],
	[monthenddate],
	[ageatendyear],
	[gendercode],
	[zip3value],
	[raceethnicitycode],
	[payergroupcode],
	[payertypecode],
	[productcode],
	[medicalindicator],
	[rxindicator],
	[macontracttypecode],
	[groupplantypecode],
	[acaindicator],
	[acaissuerstatecode],
	[acagrandfatheredindicator],
	[acaonexchangeindicator],
	[acametallevel],
	[acaactuarialvalue],
	[sourceid],
	[createddate]
)
select 
	c.[memberuid],
	[monthbegindate],
	[monthenddate],
	-- redact age
    coalesce(a.age_lvl2, '') as [ageatendyear],
    -- redact gender
	case when [gendercode] is null or [gendercode] = '' then 'U' else [gendercode] end as [gendercode],
	-- redact zip3
    case when h.memberuid is not null then '' 
        when (c.[zip3value] not like '%_%' and z2.zip3 is null) or c.[zip3value] is null or c.[zip3value] = '' then '000' 
    else coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[zip3value]) 
    end AS [zip3value],
	-- redact race
    case when [raceethnicitycode] is null or [raceethnicitycode] = '' then 'U' else [raceethnicitycode] end as [raceethnicitycode],
	[payergroupcode],
	[payertypecode],
	[productcode],
	[medicalindicator],
	[rxindicator],
	[macontracttypecode],
	[groupplantypecode],
	[acaindicator],
	[acaissuerstatecode],
	[acagrandfatheredindicator],
	[acaonexchangeindicator],
	[acametallevel],
	[acaactuarialvalue],
	[sourceid],
	[createddate]
from 
    [customer].[stg_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t] c 
    left join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
        on c.[zip3value] = z1.zip3_from
    left join (select distinct zip3 from [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]) z2
        on coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[zip3value]) = z2.zip3
    left join appl.ino_treatment_memberuids_w_heii_zip3_t h
        on c.memberuid = h.memberuid
    left join [dim].[age_ranges_t] a
        on cast(c.ageatendyear as int) between a.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound;
GO


-- QA
select top 10 * from appl.ino_control_memberuids_w_heii_zip3_t where zip3 = ''

select top 10 * from appl.ino_treatment_memberuids_w_heii_zip3_t where zip3 = ''

select ageatendyear, count(*) from [appl].[deid_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t]
group by ageatendyear
order by 1;

select gendercode, count(*) from [appl].[deid_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t]
group by gendercode;

select zip3value, count(*) 
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t] c
    inner join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
        on c.[zip3value] = z1.zip3_from
group by zip3value;

select case when zip3value in ('', '000') or zip3value is null then zip3value else 'valid' end zip3, count(*) 
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t] c
group by case when zip3value in ('', '000') or zip3value is null then zip3value else 'valid' end;

select [raceethnicitycode], count(*) from [appl].[deid_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t]
group by raceethnicitycode;


select ageatendyear, count(*) from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t]
group by ageatendyear
order by 1;

select gendercode, count(*) from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t]
group by gendercode;

select zip3value, count(*) 
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t] c
    inner join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
        on c.[zip3value] = z1.zip3_from
group by zip3value;

select case when zip3value in ('', '000') or zip3value is null then zip3value else 'valid' end zip3, count(*) 
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t] c
group by case when zip3value in ('', '000') or zip3value is null then zip3value else 'valid' end;

select [raceethnicitycode], count(*) from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t]
group by raceethnicitycode;

select memberuid from [customer].[stg_ino_control_tokens_t]
where token = '0930D9D19313F6100F40AE47DCE9C9ACEBC7DEC3F2AD4B8AE162167976BF55C52739A25AB031E69F60F79B2BFD9D774B'

select zip from [customer].[stg_ino_control_heii_t]
where input_token = '0930D9D19313F6100F40AE47DCE9C9ACEBC7DEC3F2AD4B8AE162167976BF55C52739A25AB031E69F60F79B2BFD9D774B'

select zip3 from [appl].[deid_ino_control_heii_t]
where input_token = '0930D9D19313F6100F40AE47DCE9C9ACEBC7DEC3F2AD4B8AE162167976BF55C52739A25AB031E69F60F79B2BFD9D774B'

select * from [appl].[deid_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t]
where memberuid = '256175387'

select * from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t]
where memberuid = '256175387'

select * from [customer].[stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t]
where memberuid = '256175387'



-- 2. apply xd rules to labclaim
-- drop table [appl].[deid_ino_control_labclaim_t];
-- alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_control_labclaim_t;
-- rename object appl.stg_ino_control_labclaim_t to deid_ino_control_labclaim_t;

-- drop table [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_labclaim_t];
-- alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_treatment_labclaim_t;
-- rename object appl.stg_ino_treatment_labclaim_t to deid_ino_treatment_labclaim_t;


--redact hcpcs procedure codes
update c
set c.[hcpcscode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_labclaim_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[hcpcscode] = h.code;
GO

--redact LOINC codes
update c
set c.[loinccode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_labclaim_t] c
    inner join [dim].[loinc_code_t] l
        on c.[loinccode] = l.code;
GO

--redact hcpcs procedure codes
update c
set c.[hcpcscode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_labclaim_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[hcpcscode] = h.code;
GO

--redact LOINC codes
update c
set c.[loinccode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_labclaim_t] c
    inner join [dim].[loinc_code_t] l
        on c.[loinccode] = l.code;
GO






-- 3. apply xd rules to provider
-- drop table [appl].[deid_ino_control_provider_t];
-- alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_control_provider_t;
-- rename object appl.stg_ino_control_provider_t to deid_ino_control_provider_t;

-- drop table [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_provider_t];
-- alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_treatment_provider_t;
-- rename object appl.stg_ino_treatment_provider_t to deid_ino_treatment_provider_t;

--redact provider taxonomy
update c
set c.[taxonomycode] = pt.recode,
	c.taxonomytype = pt.recode_type,
	c.taxonomyclassification = pt.recode_classification,
	c.taxonomyspecialization = pt.recode_specialization
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_provider_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[taxonomycode] = pt.code;
GO

--redact provider taxonomy
update c
set c.[taxonomycode] = pt.recode,
	c.taxonomytype = pt.recode_type,
	c.taxonomyclassification = pt.recode_classification,
	c.taxonomyspecialization = pt.recode_specialization
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_provider_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[taxonomycode] = pt.code;
GO






-- 4. apply xd rules to claim price data
--redact procedure code
-- CREATE STATISTICS deid_claims_1_procedure_code ON [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t]([PROCEDURE_CODE]);

-- drop table [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_claim_price_t];
-- alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_treatment_claim_price_t;
-- rename object appl.stg_ino_control_claim_price_t to deid_ino_control_claim_price_t;

--redact provider taxonomy
update c
set c.[providertaxonomycode] = pt.recode
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[providertaxonomycode] = pt.code;
GO

--redact tob
update c
set c.[tobcode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_t] tob
        on c.tobcode = substring(tob.code, 2, 2);

--redact DRG code
update c
set c.[msdrgcode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[drg_sensitive_codes_t] drg
        on c.[msdrgcode] = drg.code;

--redact discharge status
update c
set c.[ubpatientdischargestatuscode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[discharge_status_t] d
        on c.[ubpatientdischargestatuscode] = d.code;

--redact revenue codes
update c
set c.[ubrevenuecode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[revenue_code_t] r
        on c.[ubrevenuecode] = r.code;

--redact place of service
update c
set c.[poscode] = p.suppression
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_t] p
        on c.[poscode] = p.code;

--redact hcpcs procedure codes
update c
set c.[hcpcscode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[hcpcscode] = h.code;
GO

--redact procedure modifiers
update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode1] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode1] = pm.code;
GO

from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode2] = pm.code;
GO

update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode3] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode3] = pm.code;
GO

update c
set c.[hcpcsmodifiercode4] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] pm
        on c.[hcpcsmodifiercode4] = pm.code;
GO


--redact ICD diagnosis code
update [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] 
set [icdcmdxcode01]= ''
where [icdcmdxcode01] <> ''
    and ([icdcmdxcode01] like 'P%' or [icdcmdxcode01] like 'V%' or [icdcmdxcode01] like 'S06%7A' or [icdcmdxcode01] like 'S06%8A'  or [icdcmdxcode01] in ('R99', 'Z651', 'E6601') 
    or substring([icdcmdxcode01], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))
;
GO

update [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] 
set [icdcmdxcode01] = 'Z6841'
where [icdcmdxcode01] <> ''
    and [icdcmdxcode01] in ('Z684', 'Z6842', 'Z6843', 'Z6844', 'Z6845', 'Z685', 'Z6851', 'Z6852', 'Z6853', 'Z6854')
;
GO

from [appl].[deid_ino_control_claim_price_t] c
    inner join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] icdp
        on c.[icdcmpxcode06] = icdp.code 
        and icdp.icd_version = '10' and icdp.type = 'Procedure';
GO
